title: Automatic Air Freshener Dispenser CIPSS - Wall Mounted/Free Standing Auto Aerosol Spray Dispenser Programmable Fragrance Dispenser for Indoor-Bedroom, Hotel, Office, Commercial Place, White
features: 【Automatic Timing Air Freshener Dispenser】This fragrant sprays brings you the fragrant air automatic by timer. You can set the fragrance frequence from 5, 15, 25minutes. Interval spray time and working mode can chosen at your preferring fragrance level; working mode can be easily set to your desired fragrance delivery frequency chosen from Day/Night/24H. Detailed set guideline referring to the instruction on the package.

【Air Freshener Can】The aerosol can utilized by the perfume dispenser matches international standard size air freshener refill can(10fl.oz/300ml), 5.51"(H) x 2.56"(D). Compatible for Glade, Air Wick, Rubbermaid etc. You can get the suitable fragrance refill can on Amazon or your local store.

【Batteries Operated Spray Dispenser】The Fragrant Sprays requires 2 pcs AA batteries (NOT INCLUDED) to operate to bring continuous and long-lasting fragrance into your bedroom, bathroom, living room, guestroom, office, beauty center, gym and so on. LED IINDICATOR LIGHT - When batteries are running short, the green LED will stop blinking and red LED will begin blinking.

【Wall Mounted or Free Standing】The programmable perfume dispenser can be mounted to your preferring height with screws provided, 7-9 feet above the floor; or you can just put the metered dispenser standing on your bedroom desk, office table, etc.

【100% SATISFACTION GUARANTEE】You're guaranteed by 90-DAY MONEY BACK/REPLACEMENT, supported by 1-Year warranty. We stand firmly behind our CIPSS Aerosol Fragrance Dispenser, if you are not totally happy with the purchase, return it hassle-free for a full refund or replace your air freshener dispenser within one year. Any issues with your fragrance dispenser, please feel free to contact us via Amazon email system, we are always here to provide you with even better services as we have done.
description: Product Description Has it ever occurred that after your dinner gathering or party the smell always lingers and hard to dissipates? Or has the unpleasant odor in the bathroom ever bothered you? If so, maybe what you need is an Aerosol Dispenser! Our CIPSS automatic air freshener dispenser delivers improved aesthetics, performance and battery cost savings to your facility while providing more flexibility and control over your air care dispensing. Simplified user interface allows you to customize the dispensing minute intervals for more control over the intensity of the fragrance. The safety lock prevent unauthorized access to the fragrance canister. Battery-operated construction requires two AA batteries for up to a year of performance. The fragrance dispenser will remove the odor and refresh the air indoor automatically by timer. You can immerse yourself in your favorite fragrance and smooth your stress away. CIPSS is a professional manufacturer of bathroom products focusing on hygienic solutions for over 15 years. WHAT’S IN THE BOX: 1 x Aerosol Dispenser 1 x Installation Set 1 x User Manual NOT INCLUDED: Batteries & Spray Refill Can PROGRAMMABLE & COST EFFECTIVE With smart chip technology controlling function and timer, the perfume dispenser powered by 2 AA alkaline batteries maximizes odor control effectiveness, while keeping cost-in-use under control, and saving your spray can with programmable functions-interval spray and DAY/NIGHT/24H three working modes available. ODOR-CONTROL ASSISTANT CIPSS auto scent sprayer can help you build fragrant environment at all these places, bathroom, hotel room, office, farmhouse room with pets, that you want to improve air quality and suffer from manual spraying air freshener refill every time. Our automatic air freshener dispensers eliminate these troublesome and smelly odors for you automatically. Put a can of air freshener and set a scent frequency to let you enjoy the fresh air all the time. Our fragrance dispenser is suitable for indoor area 323-430 Sq ft/30-40㎡. SAFETY LOCK Locking design, equipped with a key, safe and suitable for commercial or public places, such as schools, hotels, hospitals, airports, restaurants, office, etc. No worry about your spray can leaves away the next morning without your continuous guard. HOW TO USE 1. Press down the top button and then open the dispenser. 2. Insert 2 AA batteries and refill can. Make sure the hammer is in the "UP" position before inserting the refill can n between the metal bracket to hold the can. 3. Set your preferred spray frequency and close the dispenser. a. Set spray interval time-push the switch to 5, 15, or 25minutes. b. Set operation mode to your preferring mode-Night, Day or 24H [Night]means units work at the selected interval time in dark conditions only. [DAY]means units work at the selected interval time in lighted conditions only. [24H]means units work at the selected interval time for 24 hours. Default spray setting is 15 minutes interval for 24 hours operation. 4. Enjoy your clear and fragrant air LED INDICATOR LIGHT&INTERVAL SPRAY FREQUENCY When batteries are running short, the Green LED will stop blinking and Red LED will begin blinking.You can set interval spray frequency from 5, 15 and 25 minutes and choose work mode as 24H mode, Day mode, or Night mode to your desired fragrance level. PRECAUTIONS & NOTES MAINTENANCE 1.This dispenser does not have waterproof function, please place dispenser away from dampness. 2. Place dispenser away from food preparation areas. 3. Avoid spraying onto plastic, varnished or painted surfaces. 4. Always replace with new alkaline batteries and never leave dead batteries inside the unit. NOTES 1. If you do not use the dispenser for long time, please take out batteries and refill can. 2. Using the On/Off switch, turn the unit on. The green LED will light up for 2 seconds. 3. Test spray by pressing the Test switch. Always ensure that the dispenser is turned away from your face when testing the spray. 4. When batteries is in low power, Green LED will not blink. CIPSS the automatic air freshener dispenser applies smart chip technology controlling functions and timer using high-end ABS material and that's why we believe in our aerosol dispenser and we back them all with ONE-YEAR customer services and provide friendly, easy-to-reach support. Buy with complete confidence, knowing that if you're not happy with the top performance of your fragrance dispenser, please feel free to let us know for replacement. Hoping our air freshener dispenser makes your life more comfortable.
